title: haw.plugin/1
description: The workspace context haw passes to a plugin, both in the HAW_JSON environment variable and on the plugin's stdin. Fully populated inside a workspace; degrades to the schema marker only when run outside one.

schema.description: Contract version marker. Always "haw.plugin/1". Check this before trusting the rest.

root.description: Absolute workspace root — the directory tree containing haw.toml. Absent outside a workspace.

stack.description: Current stack name, or null if none is selected.

repos.description: Resolved repos in the current fleet.

path.description: Absolute path to the repo checkout.

rev.description: Resolved revision — tag, branch, or commit.

phase.description: The lifecycle phase this invocation is for (e.g. "pre-build", "post-build"), passed when a plugin is fired for a hook. Absent for direct `haw <name>` dispatch.

intent.description: Set to "render" when haw asks the plugin for a human-readable TUI panel (alongside HAW_RENDER=1). A plugin seeing this should print a haw.plugin.view/1 document or raw text.
